# Tiram

> Run your business with clarity and capability. GST-ready, multi-warehouse, UPI payment-ready, and bilingual (Tamil + English).

Tiram helps shop owners, distributors, and small businesses in India issue GST invoices, track inventory across multiple warehouses, record cash/card/UPI/credit payments, manage customer dues, and see daily sales, GST, stock, profit, and audit reports. The product app is available in Tamil and English, supports browser printing and ESC/POS thermal receipt setup, and scopes each business through organization membership and role-based access. Tiram is available as a cloud web app and as an offline desktop app for Windows and Mac; the mobile app is under development.

## Pages

- [Home (English)](https://tiram.app/en): Product overview, features, pricing, FAQ.
- [Home (Tamil)](https://tiram.app/ta): முகப்பு பக்கம் — அம்சங்கள், விலை, கேள்விகள்.
- [Sign up](https://app.tiram.co.in/en/sign-up): Create a Tiram account in the product app.
- [Sign in](https://app.tiram.co.in/en/sign-in): Sign in to an existing account in the product app.

## Features

- GST invoicing with HSN/SAC, automatic CGST/SGST/IGST calculation, FY-aware reports.
- UPI payment mode and business UPI ID support for payment recording.
- Multi-warehouse inventory tracking with one-tap stock transfers and low-stock alerts.
- Daily and period reports covering sales, GST, cash, inventory, profit, receivables, payables, audit activity, top products, and defaulters.
- Multi-organization support: run multiple businesses with isolated data and role-based staff access.
- Full Tamil and English UI; Tamil-friendly receipt rendering where supported.
- Browser printing for invoices and ESC/POS thermal receipt setup, including raster printing for Tamil-friendly receipts where supported.
- Cloud subscription via Razorpay and offline desktop app for Windows and Mac, activated through the Tiram team.
- Mobile app under development.

## Pricing

Standard starts at ₹249 per user per month, exclusive of GST. Annual billing waives 2 months, so yearly billing charges 10 months. A 30-day free trial is available without a credit card.

## Contact

hello@tiram.app
